name: Ransomware Deployment System
description: State-sponsored ransomware framework designed to encrypt and disable enemy infrastructure at scale. Targets hospitals, utilities, and government systems to create societal disruption and economic pressure.

specialAbilities.name: Mass Infrastructure Encryption
specialAbilities.description: Simultaneously encrypts systems across multiple sectors, paralyzing government operations and essential services.

specialAbilities.name: Destructive Wiper Mode
specialAbilities.description: Can be switched from ransomware to data destruction mode, permanently destroying enemy data and systems.
